name: takawasi recon quality breakdown UI QA
scope: Desktop QA only. Mobile QA is outside the active target.

steps: Reset campaign from the Theater UI.
Assigned the first recon side operation to 東方辺境猟兵隊 and ケラー.
Verified baseline recon preview and breakdown chips.
Injected one bad-intel unit history and one officer intelligence-lesson history into the same saved campaign.
Reloaded and verified lesson bonus chips plus increased recon preview.

notes: The browser save was modified through developer protocol for QA setup only.
The app was visually verified at 1440px; mobile QA was intentionally skipped.
